description: NinjaTrader 8 is running on the Windows desktop with real daily OHLCV data already imported for three instruments: SPY (S&P 500 ETF), AAPL (Apple Inc.), and MSFT (Microsoft Corp.), covering January 2023 through December 2024. A financial services professional needs to set up a live screening tool to monitor these instruments side by side with key technical indicators. Create a Market Analyzer window displaying SPY, AAPL, and MSFT with columns for Last price, Net Change, and the 14-period RSI value. Save the workspace to ensure the configuration persists. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
